Container.Name: CrossWatch
Container.Overview: CrossWatch synchronizes media activity between Plex, Jellyfin, Emby and supported tracking services, with scheduled syncs, realtime monitoring, webhooks, captures and management tools.
Container.Description:
CrossWatch is a self hosted synchronization and media activity management platform.

Multi profile, multi server and multi tracker support.

Supported providers include Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, PublicMetaDB, Trakt, SIMKL, AniList, TMDb, MDBList and Tautulli.

Features include:
• Synchronization of watchlists, ratings, history and playback progress
• Realtime watcher for Plex, Jellyfin and Emby, no Plex Pass or Emby Premiere required
• Webhook based scrobbling and activity updates
• Captures for creating snapshots of watchlists, ratings and history
• Editor for inspecting, modifying, adding and blocking media items
• Playback Progress Manager for reviewing and editing unfinished playback sessions
• Analyzer for detecting stuck or inconsistent items between providers
• Unified Watchlist for viewing items from multiple providers
• CW Tracker for retaining local snapshots of media server and tracker data

CrossWatch is managed through a local web interface and supports both manual and scheduled operation.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: Plex Jellyfin Emby PublicMetaDB SIMKL Trakt AniList TMDb MDBList Tautulli watchlist ratings history playback progress scrobble synchronization webhook realtime watcher captures editor analyzer media tracker
Container.Requires: At least one supported media server or tracking service account.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port used to access the CrossWatch web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent CrossWatch configuration and application data, mounted inside the container at /config.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone used for scheduling and displayed timestamps.

Config.Name: User ID
Config.Description: Numeric user ID used to run CrossWatch. The Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: Group ID
Config.Description: Numeric group ID used to run CrossWatch. The Unraid default is 100.
